div1.entryFree:
Transparent, 1) pervious to the light, pellucid: nor shines the silver moon one half so bright through the t. bosom of the deep, LLL IV, 3, 31. t. Helena, nature shows art, that through thy bosom makes me see thy heart, Mids. II, 2, 104. bay windows t. as barricadoes, Tw. IV, 2, 40.
2) bright: the glorious sun's t. beams, H6B III, 1, 353. t. heretics (the eyes), be burnt for liars, Rom. I, 2, 96.
